business.name: Violette Silvester & Sons Inc.
business.tagline: Hartford's septic and drainage experts since generations

hero.headline: When the *basement floods*, we already know your address
hero.subheadline: Three generations of Hartford septic and drainage work — we've been solving water problems your neighbors still talk about decades later.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Septic, drainage, and water problems solved
services_section.subheading: From emergency pumping to complete system rebuilds

services.title: Septic Pumping & Cleaning
services.description: Regular maintenance and emergency pumping to keep your system running properly.

services.title: Drainage System Installation
services.description: Footer drains, sump systems, and custom solutions for water management.

services.title: System Repairs & Rebuilds
services.description: Complete septic system repairs and replacements when maintenance isn't enough.

services.title: Water Problem Diagnosis
services.description: We'll find the source and fix it right the first time.

about.heading: Three generations of getting it right
about.body: We're the Hartford septic team your neighbors recommend to their neighbors. Real solutions, not quick fixes.

reviews.name: Carl
reviews.text: Used them for years at multiple properties. Excellent! Professional, prompt, very capable and always a pleasure to work with.

reviews.name: Pat S.
reviews.text: They came recommended by a neighbor who swears by their drainage system decades later. Bill was great to work with.

reviews.name: Rick L.
reviews.text: Replaced our footer drains and improved the sump pump. Very messy work in a closed space — his crew worked hard and were extremely neat.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater Hartford
service_areas.subheading: Emergency and scheduled service throughout the region

cta.heading: Ready to solve your water problem?
cta.body: Three generations of septic and drainage experience. Free estimates on all work.
